steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: On the left side of the blank: an independent clause. On the right side: an introductory participial phrase followed by another independent clause.

steps.title: Apply the rule and choose the correct answer
steps.content: A semicolon separates two independent clauses. Choice D correctly uses a semicolon here. Choices A, B, and C fail to properly mark the boundary between the independent clauses. That matches choice D — D is correct.
